embeds.title: Administrator
embeds.description: You are a **full server administrator** with broad moderation authority. You handle serious violations, support the Moderator team, and keep the server safe and welcoming.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Monitor all public channels for rule violations
• Issue punishments for serious infractions
• Assist Head Mods with escalated cases
• Review moderation tickets from members
• Respond to staff pings and reports promptly
• Support and guide the Moderator team

fields.name: 🛠️ How to Handle a Ticket
fields.value:
1️⃣ **Claim** the ticket so others know it's being handled
2️⃣ **Read the full context** — don't jump to conclusions
3️⃣ **Gather evidence** from relevant channels
4️⃣ **Apply** the appropriate action per punishment tiers
5️⃣ **Inform** the ticket creator of the outcome
6️⃣ **Close and log** the ticket in #mod-log

**Temp ban limit:** Up to 14 days independently.
**Permanent bans:** Require Head Admin sign-off.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Full punishment authority (mute, kick, ban)
• Temp bans up to 14 days independently
• Permanent bans with Head Admin approval
• Access to moderation logs and ticket system
• Can manage Moderators in absence of Head Admin

fields.name: 📤 Handle Directly
fields.value:
• All mutes and temp bans up to 14 days
• Ticket resolutions
• Standard rule enforcement
• Escalated Moderator reports
• Channel cleanup and message management

fields.name: 🚨 Escalate to Head Administrator
fields.value:
• Permanent ban decisions
• Appeals from previously banned members
• Situations involving multiple departments
• Staff misconduct reports
• Any case you're uncertain about — always better to ask

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives from:** Head Mods, Mods
**Escalates to:** Head Administrator → Executive
